nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: 黑颊情侣鹦鹉
nodes.summary: 黑颊情侣鹦鹉（Black-cheeked lovebird，学名 Agapornis nigrigenis），在图谱中标记为易危（VU）物种，主要分布于赞比亚，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、猎捕压力、森林砍伐。

nodes.name: 猎捕压力
nodes.summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。

nodes.name: VU
nodes.summary: VU表示 IUCN 易危等级，当前关联694种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、索马里鸵鸟、大斑几维鸟等694种鸟类。

nodes.name: 赞比亚
nodes.summary: 赞比亚是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联182种鸟类，包括南非鸭、Western crested guinea fowl、White-throated francolin等182种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is mainly green and has a brown head, red beak, and white eyerings. It is endemic to a relatively small range in southwest Zambia, where it is vulnerable to habitat loss

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It is listed as a vulnerable species as its population is in decline due to continuous habitat loss

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: This is due to gradual desiccation of water bodies, causing drought, farming practices, hunting and trapping, fishing, logging and diseases

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: This is due to gradual desiccation of water bodies, causing drought, farming practices, hunting and trapping, fishing, logging and diseases
